channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: UFC boss Dana White says 'never again' to another White House fight night
item.description: The headaches over weather concerns in the outdoors show, the logistics of construction of the cage and staging events at federal landmarks and the soaring cost made Freedom 250 a one-off.
item.content:encoded:
The headaches over weather concerns in the outdoors show, the logistics of construction of the cage and staging events at federal landmarks and the soaring cost made Freedom 250 a one-off.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Former ICE leader lands new job consulting on national security and defense
item.description: Because of his former job, Todd Lyons cannot engage with the Department of Homeland Security for a year, per federal law.
item.content:encoded:
Because of his former job, Todd Lyons cannot engage with the Department of Homeland Security for a year, per federal law.

(Image credit: Samuel Corum)
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: Newsom points fingers at DOJ
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom claims the Trump administration is targeting him and his wife.
item.content:encoded: California Gov. Gavin Newsom claims the Trump administration is targeting him and his wife.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lucas

item.title: Farmers are changing their CSA models to meet consumers where they are
item.description: Community-supported agriculture delivers local produce by having customers pay a farm upfront. Some farmers are changing the model to appeal to consumer preferences.
item.content:encoded: Community-supported agriculture delivers local produce by having customers pay a farm upfront. Some farmers are changing the model to appeal to consumer preferences.
item.dc:creator: Hope Kirwan

item.title: As Luigi Mangione's lawyers head to court, support grows for the accused 'vigilante'
item.description: Luigi Mangione's legal team is back in court in New York City this week for a key pretrial hearing. He's accused of stalking and killing an insurance CEO. Donors have given $1.5 million to support his defense.
item.content:encoded:
Luigi Mangione's legal team is back in court in New York City this week for a key pretrial hearing. He's accused of stalking and killing an insurance CEO. Donors have given $1.5 million to support his defense.

(Image credit: Leon Neal)
item.dc:creator: Brian Mann

item.title: U.S. and Iran announce an initial deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The deal is a major breakthrough in the conflict that set the Middle East aflame and shook the global economy. However, it did not resolve critical issues set aside for further negotiations.
item.content:encoded:
The deal is a major breakthrough in the conflict that set the Middle East aflame and shook the global economy. However, it did not resolve critical issues set aside for further negotiations.

(Image credit: Mandel Ngan)
item.dc:creator: Greg Myre

item.title: It's been a thrilling start to the World Cup. Here are the highlights and what's next
item.description: Now that the FIFA World Cup is underway in Mexico, Canada and the U.S., the drama has shifted to the fields, where there have been several surprising results heading into the first full week.
item.content:encoded:
Now that the FIFA World Cup is underway in Mexico, Canada and the U.S., the drama has shifted to the fields, where there have been several surprising results heading into the first full week.

(Image credit: Patrick T. Fallon)
item.dc:creator: Russell Lewis

item.title: Trump celebrates 80th birthday with Iran deal and UFC fights at the White House
item.description: President Donald Trump marked his 80th birthday on Sunday by hailing an initial agreement to end the war in Iran and staging a cage-fighting show on the White House's storied South Lawn.
item.content:encoded:
President Donald Trump marked his 80th birthday on Sunday by hailing an initial agreement to end the war in Iran and staging a cage-fighting show on the White House's storied South Lawn.

(Image credit: Mark Schiefelbein)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: 12 dead after skydiving plane crashes in Missouri
item.description: Authorities say 11 skydivers and a pilot are presumed dead after a single-engine turboprop plane crashed Sunday near Butler, Missouri.
item.content:encoded: Authorities say 11 skydivers and a pilot are presumed dead after a single-engine turboprop plane crashed Sunday near Butler, Missouri.
item.dc:creator: Madeline Fox

item.title: Trump's name removed from Kennedy Center
item.description: President Trump's name no longer adorns the Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts in Washington, D.C. after a court ordered it removed from the building and the organization's website.
item.content:encoded: President Trump's name no longer adorns the Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts in Washington, D.C. after a court ordered it removed from the building and the organization's website.
item.dc:creator: Debbie Elliott
